subcodes.first_line: God beareth witness in the Kingdom of Utterance that this Cause is mighty, mighty indeed. Blessed is the soul whom the doubts of the people have not caused to stumble [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله فی ملکوت البیان ان الامر عظیم عظیم طوبی لنفس ما زلتها شبهات القوم
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @high station of the true believer, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
